description: You are an internal auditor performing forensic data analysis to detect potential invoice fraud. Using the benford.analysis R package and its built-in corporate.payment dataset, perform a Second-Order (First-Two Digits) Benford's Law analysis on the Amount column. Document your analysis in /home/ga/RProjects/audit_analysis.R. Generate the standard Benford distribution plot as /home/ga/RProjects/output/benford_plot.png. Export the digit statistics, including digits, observed frequencies, expected frequencies, and Z-scores, to /home/ga/RProjects/output/benford_stats.csv. Identify the digit combination with the largest deviation (Z-score) and export the corresponding suspicious invoice records from the original dataset to /home/ga/RProjects/output/suspect_invoices.csv.
